name: course-quota-web
description: Cindy's table-tennis course tracker — a local-only Android mobile web tool.

scripts.test: tsc src/db/courseRecordRules.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution bundler --strict --noUncheckedIndexedAccess --exactOptionalPropertyTypes --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp/test-dist && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
